sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21611" key="ganwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γᾰν-ωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n21611.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tinned, polished, lackered</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀγγεῖον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
